name: hide-my-email
title: Hide My Email
description: Create, search and manage your iCloud Hide My Email addresses without digging through Settings.
author: felixwohnhaas

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Hide My Email
commands.subtitle: iCloud
commands.description: Search, copy and manage your existing Hide My Email addresses.

commands.name: create
commands.title: Create Hide My Email
commands.subtitle: iCloud
commands.description: Generate and reserve a new Hide My Email address.

preferences.name: appleId
preferences.title: Apple ID
preferences.description: The email address of your iCloud (Apple ID) account.

preferences.name: password
preferences.title: Password
preferences.description: Your Apple ID password. Stored only in Raycast's encrypted preferences and sent only to Apple. You'll enter a 2FA code about once a month.

preferences.name: region
preferences.title: Region
preferences.description: Use the standard or the China (icloud.com.cn) iCloud endpoints.
